The '''Bongomeken Collective''' was a [[Gungan/Legends|Gungan]] manufacturing group located near [[Spearhead/Legends|Spearhead]] that possibly included the original inventors of the [[Bongo]]s. [[Gallo/Legends|Gallo]] sent [[Marsune (Gungan)|Marsune]] to ally with them in order to gain their assistance in destroying [[Rogoe/Legends|Rogoe's]] fortress, which led to the end the [[War of the Gungan tribes]].

{{Company-stub}}
